title: KandyToys 4-in-1 Glitter Crystal Putty | 2 Design of Slime | 1 Design Sent Random
features: N.B 2 Colour combinations, 1 sent out at random
Super stretchy fun for all ages
description: 4 different colours of fun glitter crystal putty in a tub. Mould this super stretchy glitter effect putty into as many different creations you could possibly imagine or simply just for entertainment. This Glitter crystal putty comes in 2 different colour combinations, red, green, yellow and blue combination or purple,pink, silver and blue combination. N.B 2 Colour Combinations, 1 Sent out at random
